welcome:
🏟️ Welcome to SPLITRIDE! ⚽

Split your ride home from the World Cup with fellow fans.

Tap the button below to open the app and find your match!
payment_description: Support SplitRide with a cup of coffee (150 Stars, ~$3) to match with other fans heading to {zone} from {stadium}!
payment_success:
✅ Coffee received! You're in the queue for {stadium} → {zone}.

Waiting for {remaining} more fans...
topic_welcome:
🚗 RIDE GROUP: {stadium} → {zone}

👥 Your crew of {count} is matched!

📍 NEXT STEPS:
1. Tap the 📎 button → 📍 Location → Share Live Location (1 hour)
2. Meet at the designated gate
3. One person orders the Uber/ride — split the cost {count} ways

⚠️ If someone doesn't show up, use the button below to report.
report_prompt: Who didn't show up? Select the user below:
report_received: ✅ Report received. If 2+ riders confirm, refunds will be issued automatically.
report_already: You've already submitted a report for this ride.
refund_issued: 💰 Refund of {amount} ⭐ has been issued to your account.
user_blacklisted: 🚫 User has been flagged for no-show and suspended for 3 days.
blacklisted_error: ⛔ You are currently suspended due to a no-show report. Your suspension lifts in {hours} hours.
queue_timeout: ⏰ We couldn't find enough riders in time. Your {amount} ⭐ have been refunded.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
superchat_welcome:
👋 Welcome {mention} to the SplitRide Supergroup! 🏟️⚽

💬 Feel free to use this group chat to coordinate and find rides with other fans completely *free of charge*! This chat is and always will be open and free.

🚕 *Want an easier and faster way to match?*
Try our automated *SplitRide Mini App*! For just *$3* (worth a cup of coffee ☕), it instantly matches you with a crew of riders heading to your exact destination, sets up a private group, and provides live coordination status buttons.

🎁 *First Time?* Your first ride search is *100% FREE*!

👉 Tap the button below to launch the app!
